# N Joinery

> Specialists in high-end architectural joinery and bespoke fitted furniture across the United Kingdom.

N Joinery is a specialist workshop dedicated to high-end architectural joinery and bespoke fitted furniture. With decades of experience, we create exceptional custom pieces that combine superior craftsmanship with innovative design.

## Services

- **Bespoke Design** — Custom solutions tailored precisely to your space, lifestyle, and architectural vision.
- **Master Craftsmanship** — Decades of expertise brought to every joint, every grain, and every finish.
- **Fitted Furniture** — Built-in wardrobes, libraries, kitchens, and architectural elements that become part of your home.
- **Premium Finishes** — Hand-selected hardwoods, veneers, and hardware with meticulous attention to every surface.

## Specialisms

- Luxury walnut and oak kitchens
- Floor-to-ceiling fitted libraries and cabinetry
- Bespoke ecclesiastical and church doors with stained glass
- Custom sauna builds with integrated lighting
- Specialist timber inlay — compass stars, Celtic knots, Art Deco sunburst motifs
- Hardwood flooring with decorative inlay patterns
- Architectural panelling and bespoke doors

## Process

1. **Consult** — Detailed conversation about your space, requirements, and design preferences.
2. **Design** — Detailed designs, material selection, and options presented for approval.
3. **Craft** — Meticulous workshop fabrication using traditional techniques and modern precision.
4. **Install** — Professional installation with final adjustments made on-site.

## Contact

- Website: https://njoinery.co.uk
- Email: info@njoinery.co.uk
- Location: United Kingdom
